zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Allen Pearl於1540年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Allen Parle20歲，母親Bertha M Perley18歲。他和Lydia Elizabeth Peabody至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1610年享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pearl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, apparently from Middle English perle, perel ‘pearl’ (Old French perle, medieval Latin perla, perula).
English: possibly a variant of Prill with metathesis of -r-.
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Perel  .

variants.name: Parler
meanings: German: from an agent derivative of Middle High German perle ‘pearl’, hence an occupational name for a beadworker, embroiderer, or pearl trader. Compare Pearl . The presence of -a- where standard German would have -e- is a feature of former eastern (i.e. Bohemian, Silesian) dialects.

variants.name: Purl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Rakesh, Renu.

variants.name: Prill
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Heinz, Kurt, Lothar, Otto, Siegfried, Willi.
habitational name, a variant of   Brill  .
nickname for someone thought to resemble a minnow, from dialect Prill, Brüll, Prüll.

variants.name: Perelman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Gershon, Myer, Naum, Rakhil, Varda, Aron, Avigail, Bluma, Chaim, Genya, Haim.  Russian Lev, Leonid, Boris, Mikhail, Natalya, Aleksandr, Beyla, Efim, Grigoriy, Klavdiya, Liliya, Raisa.
elaborated form of Pearl 2, withthe addition of Yiddish man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Allen Pearl was born in 1540, in Wales, his father, Allen Parle, was 20 and his mother, Bertha M Perley, was 18. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Lydia Elizabeth Peabody. He died in 1610, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Allen Pearl est né en 1540, à Galles, son père, Allen Parle, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Bertha M Perley, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Lydia Elizabeth Peabody. Il est décédé en 1610, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Allen Pearlが1540年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Allen Parleは20歳，母Bertha M Perleyは18歳であった。彼はLydia Elizabeth Peabodyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1610年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Allen Pearl(이)가 1540년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Allen Parle(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha M Perley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Lydia Elizabeth Peabody(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
